Off Calendar Aug-22-2023 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Notice Of Settlement
Off Calendar Jun-26-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.'s Motion To Set Aside Notice Of Settlement.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to set aside notice of settlement" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)
